title: Social Security Act 2018 — New Zealand
description: New Zealand's principal legislation governing social security benefits and assistance, administered by the Ministry of Social Development. Covers eligibility requirements, benefit types, beneficiary obligations, and compliance mechanisms for jobseeker support, sole parent support, disability support, and various allowances.
